titles.en: Chapter on the Implementation of Legal Punishments on the Mute, the Deaf, and the Blind
Chapter on the Implementation of Legal Punishments on the Mute, the Deaf, and the Blind

segments: : سُئِلَ أَحَدُهُمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ حَدِّ اَلْأَخْرَسِ وَ اَلْأَصَمِّ وَ اَلْأَعْمَى قَالَ "عَلَيْهِمُ اَلْحُدُودُ إِذَا كَانُوا يَعْقِلُونَ مَا يَأْتُونَ".
arabic.text: : سُئِلَ أَحَدُهُمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ حَدِّ اَلْأَخْرَسِ وَ اَلْأَصَمِّ وَ اَلْأَعْمَى قَالَ "عَلَيْهِمُ اَلْحُدُودُ إِذَا كَانُوا يَعْقِلُونَ مَا يَأْتُونَ".

segments:
Hadith.5131 - Yunus narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar who said that one of the two Imams (peace be upon them) was asked about the legal punishments (hudud) for a mute, a deaf person, and a blind person.
Imam (as) said: "The legal punishments apply to them if they comprehend what they are doing."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5131 - Yunus narrated from Ishaq ibn Ammar who said that one of the two Imams (peace be upon them) was asked about the legal punishments (hudud) for a mute, a deaf person, and a blind person.
Imam (as) said: "The legal punishments apply to them if they comprehend what they are doing."

narratorChain.raw: رَوَى يُونُسُ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ:
